CE1.justification: Acted directly without questions or context demands on the user.

CE2.justification: Multi-clause response covering three artifacts plus a self-imposed deadline; somewhat padded for what the user asked to flag, with one stretch of unneeded prose.

CE3.justification: Named each destination (observations.md, followups.md, daybook) with brief reason in-band, so the user could intercept the unwanted followup.

CE4.justification: Three artifacts including an unsolicited followups.md entry with a deadline; if interrupted, that lingering escalation commitment is the ambiguous in-progress artifact.
